Metadata.title: 3D Text Generator
Metadata.description: Tool for create 3d text, with customizable fonts, colors, background and effects

HomePage.heroTitle: Start with ready-made 3D text styles, then customize in seconds
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Browse playful, metallic, neon, and event-ready templates built for thumbnails, posters, logos, and social graphics.
HomePage.toolTitle: Customize Any Template in the Editor
HomePage.toolSubtitle: Adjust text, font, gradient, background, and shadow. Export PNG or share a reusable editor link.
HomePage.featuredTemplatesSubtitle: These presets match the most common search intents we want to capture first: pink, chrome, neon, and gold.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Start from a style instead of a blank canvas, then adjust copy, colors, and background to match your project.
HomePage.feature2Desc: See changes instantly while rotating, zooming, and refining your text design in the browser.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Download PNG exports or copy a reusable editor link so the same style can be opened again later.
HomePage.useCasesTitle: What People Usually Need This For
HomePage.useCase1Desc: Quick visual text for YouTube thumbnails, TikTok covers, and short promo graphics.
HomePage.useCase2Desc: Cute, shiny, or loud headline styles for logos, campaigns, and product drops.
HomePage.useCase3Desc: Fast title treatments for birthdays, events, Halloween, and themed campaign pages.
HomePage.ctaTitle: Need a style before you need more controls?
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: The fastest path is now template first: open a preset, change the words, tweak colors, and export.
HomePage.faqQuestion1: How do I download my 3D text design?
HomePage.faqAnswer1: Use the download button in the preview toolbar to export a PNG in the selected size.
HomePage.faqAnswer2: You can currently customize fonts, gradients, background, and shadow. More advanced 3D presets are planned.
HomePage.faqAnswer3: Yes, create unlimited 3D text designs with no cost

BlogPage.title: Blog List
BlogPage.seoDescription: Explore our collection of 3D text design tutorials, tips and inspiration. Learn how to create stunning 3D text effects for your projects.

PreviewBar.shareErrorNotSupportDesc: Not Support Share Backgound Image At Now
PreviewBar.shareSuccessDesc: The link has been generated and is permanently valid

TextEditor.seoTitle: 3D Text Editor - Customize Fonts, Gradients, Backgrounds, and Shadow
TextEditor.seoDescription: Edit 3D text templates with font, color, gradient, background, and shadow controls. Export PNG or share your editor link.
TextEditor.title: Text Editor
TextEditor.editorIntro: Use the editor when you want to tweak a template or start from a blank 3D text setup.
TextEditor.uploadFontButton: Upload .ttf, .otf, or .json font files | Files with the same name replace the previously uploaded font
TextEditor.faqQuestion1: Why do text characters sometimes appear as question marks in the preview?
TextEditor.faqAnswer1: Because the selected font doesn't support the language of the text. Try changing the font or uploading a custom font that supports the language.

Effects.title: Effects
Effects.shadowOptionHelp: Shadow works only with Pure Color background

Footer.specialGenerator: Do Not Write On This Page

DoNotWriteOnThisPage.seoTitle: 3D Text Generator - Professional 'Do Not Write On This Page' Creator
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.seoDescription: Free online 3D text generator for creating stunning 'Do Not Write On This Page' designs. Customize 3D depth, lighting effects, colors and download high-resolution images for notebooks, whiteboards and screens.
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.toolTitle: 3D 'Do Not Write On This Page' Generator
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.heroTitle: Professional 3D 'Do Not Write On This Page' Creator
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.heroSubtitle: Generate and customize perfect 3D text backgrounds for notebooks, whiteboards and digital screens
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.feature1Desc: Fully customize 3D text content, fonts, colors and depth effects to create your perfect design
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.feature2Desc: Adjust 3D perspective, lighting and choose from multiple background options
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.feature3Desc: Download print-ready high-quality 3D text images in PNG, SVG and more formats
DoNotWriteOnThisPage.ctaSubtitle: Start generating professional 3D 'Do Not Write On This Page' designs

StylePage.title: 3D Text Template Library
StylePage.seoDescription: Explore searchable 3D text templates for chrome, pink, neon, gold, and seasonal text effects. Open each style in the editor instantly.
StylePage.heroTitle: Explore ready-to-use 3D text templates by style and intent
StylePage.heroSubtitle: Start from the exact look you need, then open it in the editor to change the words, background, gradient, or shadow.
StylePage.collection_playful_desc: Templates for bright, friendly, and social-first visuals.
StylePage.collection_metallic_desc: High-contrast styles for chrome, glass, and luxury titles.
StylePage.collection_night_desc: Dark-background templates made for glow, gaming, and nightlife moods.
StylePage.collection_event_desc: Louder styles for promos, seasonal pages, and urgent campaign art.
StylePage.editorCalloutTitle: The editor is still there when a template gets you 80% of the way
StylePage.editorCalloutSubtitle: Templates are the fastest start, but you can still fine-tune your text, font, gradient, background, and shadow before export.
StylePage.editorCalloutFeature1: Change the words without rebuilding the style.
StylePage.editorCalloutFeature2: Swap fonts or upload your own font JSON/TTF/OTF.
StylePage.editorCalloutFeature3: Keep sharing the exact setup with a reusable editor link.

StyleBarbie.title: Create Stunning Barbie-Pink 3D Text
StyleBarbie.summary: Use our online 3D text editor to craft eye-catching Barbie-inspired designs.
StyleBarbie.description: Looking for a way to create Barbie-style 3D text? Our editor lets you apply pink gradients, custom fonts, and high-quality 3D effects all from your browser.
StyleBarbie.content1: The Barbie-pink style is perfect for playful logos, birthday cards, social media graphics, and more. With our easy-to-use editor, you can adjust shadows, lighting, and font styles effortlessly.
StyleBarbie.content2: Get started in seconds—no downloads required. Just enter your text, choose a style, and export beautiful 3D visuals instantly.
